---
title: "test_quick_check.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/test_quick_check.py"
loc: 10
complexity: 1
logic_score: 5.65
style_score: 7.99
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 8.56
---

## Intent
Core semantic routing engine for intent resolution.

## Interaction Protocol
Instantiate SovereignEngine and invoke run(query) to process natural language directives.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 8.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.debug.quick_check](file://src.tools.debug.quick_check)

### Exports
- `test_run_quick_check_logic`
- `MockEngine`
- `__init__`
- `load_core_skills`
- `build_index`
- `search`
